scripts.build: npm run firebase:config && npm run version:write && npm run build:hosting
scripts.deploy: npm run version:bump && npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting,database --project n-relay-bridge-db
scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/firebase-client.js && node --check sw.js && node --check tools/bump-version.mjs && node --check tools/build-firebase-config.mjs && node --check tools/build-hosting.mjs && node --check tools/dev-server.mjs && node --check tools/env-utils.mjs && node --check tools/write-app-version.mjs
